decisions.decision: flask.request not flask_socketio.request for SID in Socket.IO handlers
decisions.rationale: flask_socketio does not export request — Flask patches the standard request object with .sid

decisions.decision: Deploy via scp (no git on VPS, no rsync on Windows)
decisions.rationale: VPS /opt/nerve/app has no .git; rsync unavailable in Windows git bash; deploy.sh updated to scp

decisions.decision: Webhook uses raw request.data for Stripe signature verification
Idempotency via stripe_event_id UNIQUE index — silent skip on duplicate
checkout_success only flashes, subscription activation in webhook only
decisions.rationale: D-12 — webhook is authoritative source of truth

decisions.decision: All services on EU servers (Deepgram api.eu.deepgram.com, Claude Bedrock Frankfurt, ElevenLabs EU Residency, Stripe Frankfurt)
decisions.rationale: DSGVO compliance — no SCCs needed for EU-to-EU transfers

next_action: Resume Phase 4: reply 'done' to 04-03 AVV checkpoint OR skip to Wave 2 (04-02 pricing page). Run: /gsd:execute-phase 4
context_notes: Phase 4.1 (live mic) fully complete and verified on getnerve.app 2026-04-03. Root bug was flask_socketio.request import. Phase 4 Wave 1 is 75% done — 04-01 complete, 04-03 code done but waiting on human AVV signing checkpoint. Wave 2 (04-02 pricing + fair-use) not started.
